name: Sticky Planet
description: Launch, Stick, and Survive! Welcome to Sticky Planet, the addictive hyper-casual arcade game where gravity is your best friend—and your worst enemy. How to Play: • Tap anywhere to launch your ship from its current planet. • Time your shots perfectly to land on the next planet. • Master the orbital physics and changing gravity. • Avoid the void and dont miss! Chain successful landings to build your Combo Multiplier and rack up massive high scores. Featuring vibrant visuals, satisfying physics, and instant-restart gameplay for that just one more try feeling. Can you conquer the galaxy?
instructions: Controls - Tap Click anywhere to launch from the planet - Time your jumps to orbit around planets - Collect stars for points - Dont drift into space
